title: Odd Accessories
description: Adds some unusual accessories to your world!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a80d0d25035eb2b56a3590fe09c7258e63c9bb2_0.webp)

### **About**

Odd Accessories is a lightweight mod that adds **over 40** unusual curio accessories to Minecraft, each with interesting abilities and effects. Most can be dropped from chests, killing mobs, or trading with villagers, but some require crafting to obtain. These accessories were made with the intention to fit well in modpacks and more, so feel free to drop this mod in!

**[NOTE: Requires Curios API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)**

[(Cloth Config compatible on version 1.20.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)

![Item gallery!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3783527c3c7b2aac7a552010e9d856cc799c1c48.png)

### **Configuration**

Items stats, drop rates, effects, etc, are customizable through the config file. The config file also explains some effects that might be a little vague to the player.

Please let me know if you want something to be configurable that currently isn't!

![Bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b888b0de39e41596e3a86d2c0613d1130fd4bd0.png)

↑ These have a chance to be dropped from all mobs, and can also be obtained through trading ↓

![Trading](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b27571a1d81ba88a25ba8e259bf100ca3f035d3.png)

### **Feedback**

Found a bug? Want to suggest a new accessory? Any other things? Please write a comment and let me know!
